E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E1 - Shapes, Songs & Story Time!
programme.desc: Join Ms. Appleberry & JJ for a learning adventure! Explore the letters B, C, R & U through fun activities. Play pretend as you make 'beep-beep' sounds on a bus & act like a playful pup. Sing along to classic songs, discover surprises inside the Melon Learning Box with a special guest & enjoy a rainy day adventure.

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some big outdoor adventures with Baby John! First, Dad makes sure the family is prepared with the proper clothes, first aid & food. Then, the family enters a sandcastle competition, where Baby John, Jack & Jill work together to build a giant sand turtle! The fun continues as the family goes camping, but nighttime is a little scary! Mom & Dad show the kids there's nothing to be afraid of, especially with the beautiful stars to look at!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E2 - How Does It Work?!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering, 'How does it work?!' Join Blippi & his robot buddy FETCH on an adventure to find the answers! Blippi shrinks down to fly inside a beehive & learn how honey is made, & explores a garbage truck to find out why flies love it so much. Then, it’s a trip through a factory to see how chocolate is made! The adventure even travels through time as Blippi meets his great-grandpa to see the very first cars. Plus, Blippi & FETCH help a nervous crane learn to build a skyscraper!

programme.title: E1 - What Makes Our Family So Special!
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns what makes his family so special! First, he recounts all the wonderful things about his big sister Jill, from the way they splash in the bathtub to how she takes care of him when he gets a boo boo. Then, he's not interested in spending the day with grandpa, until he sees his vintage motorbike! Together they use their imaginations to take the motorbike through fantastical lands. It's a day of learning how special family is!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E31 - Work
programme.desc: In a game of 'Work', Dad hires Bluey and Bingo at his drainpipe factory. But when Bluey takes charge, Dad finds his new boss pretty tough, especially her no dancing rule.

programme.title: E32 - Bumpy And The Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bingo is sick in hospital, so Bluey and Dad sent her a homemade video to lift her spirits. It tells the tale of Barnicus' quest to heal her spotty dog named Bumpy.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E36 - The Leshan Giant Buddha, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters master the art of mindfulness to save the Giant Buddha of Leshan in China.

programme.title: E21 - Robotato Returns
programme.desc: Evil Pea commands Carrot's new and improved Robotato to protect her. But when he malfunctions and carries her to the top of Tato Tower, it's up to the real Supertato to save her.

programme.title: E8 - The Kite Badge
programme.desc: It's a very windy day and the squirrels want to play outside. What can they do? Duggee knows - he's flying his kite. The Squirrels set about making their own kites to fly.

programme.title: E12 - Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E14 - Night And Day
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E32 - Bumpy And The Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bingo is sick in hospital, so Bluey and Dad sent her a homemade video to lift her spirits. It tells the tale of Barnicus' quest to heal her spotty dog named Bumpy.

programme.title: E111 - Mixed Up
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po have their favourite things. The bag, the hat, the scooter and the ball all magically swap places and become mixed up.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E16 - Eugene's Animal Chorus
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: E47 - Go Jet Academy: Symbiosis Shrink Down
programme.desc: The Go Jetters learn about 'symbiosis' - when two different animals or plants help each other.

programme.title: E16 - Yoga Ball
programme.desc: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E43 - The Looking After Badge
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: E41 - The Grandparents Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are tidying up - its Bring your Grandparents to Squirrel Club Day. Duggee has his Grandparents badge so he knows what they will like, a nice cup of tea.

programme.title: E2 - Fatberg, London Sewers, England
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots create some enormous blockages after flushing wet wipes.

programme.title: E15 - Gordon And Rebecca - Coming Through!
programme.desc: Gordon and Rebecca do the same work, but go about it differently, and when Rebecca tries to be more like Gordon, it doesn't go well.

programme.title: E2 - Hat Fuss
programme.desc: Scarf Lady needs some inspiration so Sarah takes her to the Hat Museum.

programme.title: E3 - Bubbles
programme.desc: Stanley cleans Cynthia's bus, but each time he does it keeps getting dirty again. It's so dirty by the end, he invents a super-duper cleaning machine that makes a sea of bubbles.

programme.title: E2 - House
programme.desc: Myrtle's aunt Cressy is coming to stay, and she needs Stanley to make her a bed for her. This escalates into Stanley building her a whole set of rooms outside Myrtles actual house.

programme.title: E13 - I Actually Gave Santa A High Five
programme.desc: The talking animals talk about everything they love about Easter, Halloween, and Christmas!

programme.title: E17 - Pavlova
programme.desc: Mum won't let Bingo have Pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: E17 - The Sharing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things between them

programme.title: E610 - Starla's Wild West Birthday

programme.title: E104 - Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E402 - Buns In Space / Scratch And Sniff
programme.desc: Kai invents a Bunzooka to send Bobbi's buns into space, but they end up damaging the Dinobird! // Kai and Professor Scratch's upgrades to a Robo-Rose create a stinky cloud over the city!

programme.title: E104 - Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E203 - The Crew Builds A Mini Golf Course/The Crew Builds A Butterfly Garden
programme.desc: When a family of bunnies hops onto the soccer field, Rubble & Crew use their skills to build a new sport... Bunny Ball! // After the pups discover a new kind of butterfly, it flutters away! Will a giant butterfly garden help bring it back?

programme.title: E402 - Buns In Space / Scratch And Sniff
programme.desc: Kai invents a Bunzooka to send Bobbi's buns into space, but they end up damaging the Dinobird! // Kai and Professor Scratch's upgrades to a Robo-Rose create a stinky cloud over the city!

programme.title: E610 - Starla's Wild West Birthday
programme.desc: Starla's wild west birthday party is in trouble when her cake gets carried off by a runaway train. Can she, Blaze and AJ catch up and save the cake before it's too late?

programme.title: E104 - Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E114 - Gasquatch
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are deep in the woods when they discover and befriend a mud-loving monster truck named Gasquatch. Now, they must set out on an epic adventure to bring their new friend to Mud Fest... the muddiest party of all time.

programme.title: E308 - The Crew Builds A Giant Duck Plane / The Crew Builds A Vet Room For Motor
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: E305 - Dora's Birthday Surprise / Moonlight Fiesta
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find Dora's lost birthday cake and the family throws her a surprise birthday party! // Dora and Boots help La Luna find the Luna Lily so everyone can enjoy the Moonlight Fiesta.

programme.title: E208 - Bbarbalalalalalala / The Biodisaster
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: E103 - Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: E612 - Big Rig: Dolphin Delivery
programme.desc: When a dolphin named Flippy needs help getting back to his family in the ocean, there's only one monster machine with enough power to get the job done: Big Rig Blaze!

programme.title: E110 - The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid.

programme.title: E108 - The Case Of The Blue Bandit / The Honey Badger Break-In
programme.desc: The pals search for the culprit who nabbed a crab's spiral shell home. // Sweetie the honey badger sneaks onto Sam and Kit's bee-infested aircraft.

programme.title: E103 - The Missing Mole Rat Princess
programme.desc: In a world of anthropomorphic animals, Sam Snow and Kit Casey are elite agents of C.L.A.D.E. (Covert League of Animal Detective Experts) who travel the world solving mysteries with their expertise in problem-solving and animal facts.

programme.title: A la une : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Tout ce qui fait et fera la une de la journée : économie, international, analyses et décryptages, revue de presse et grands temps forts à venir, pour suivre en continu les événements majeurs en France et dans le monde.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Japa: Survival Or Selfishness? | Convince Me
programme.desc: In this episode of Convince Me, two teams from the University of Lagos debate: Is Japa the smartest move you can make? Or is it ultimately a selfish one? Can there even be a compromise?

programme.title: Old But Bold - How An 81-Year-Old Sprinter Chases A World Record
programme.desc: How do you stay fit in old age? Friedhelm Adorf has the answer. The 81-year-old exercises every morning, eats a healthy diet and trains for a world record: the 200m sprint in his age group. Unfortunately, his knee is giving him problems. Will he still succeed?

programme.desc: Lay Lay feels threatened by new student, Cobo. When Cobo applies for a job at BoomBox Burger, Lay Lay pounces on the opportunity to show him up by applying, too. This leads to 'The Burger Games,' a competition that puts their skills to the test.

programme.title: E25 - Weekend In Luxembourg
programme.desc: Luxembourg, a little-known, authentic and inspiring country. At the heart of this rediscovery lie majestic forests, secret valleys, picturesque villages and a vibrant culture driven by an engaged, innovative population proud of its roots. Not to mention the discreet but central role of the Grand Ducal family.

programme.title: Hotel Du Cap Eden Roc, Un Paradis Sur Terre
programme.desc: At the tip of Cap d'Antibes, perched on the rocks, stands one of the world's most sought-after palaces and one of the most luxurious on the French Riviera. For 150 years, the prestigious Eden Roc has attracted actors, artists and politicians in search of privacy. Stunning views, magnificent park: a guided tour.

programme.title: E62 - Montreuil-Bellay
programme.desc: Perched on a rocky spur, the Chateau de Montreuil-Bellay was built for war. With its 15 defense towers and 600 meters of ramparts, the building resembles an unassailable fortress.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene:2025-2026
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: E23 - Here's A Seagull
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Ma Vie, Ma Gueule
programme.desc: << I am 55 years old and I still don't know what my nature is. >> Barberie Bichette, known as Barbie, is going through an existential crisis and piles up often comical misadventures. An intimate portrait of a woman in three acts, a comedy, a tragedy, an epiphany.

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E326
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E6 - The Center Of Africa Lost In The Jungle
programme.desc: On his final leg in Africa Otto struggles as tropical rainfall make progress difficult and drinking water becomes scarce.

programme.title: E10 - New Levels Of Chaos
programme.desc: Parker unleashes chaos as the team tries to get four wash plants running. Tony splurges on a new wash plant to get more gold.

programme.title: E6 - The Center Of Africa Lost In The Jungle
programme.desc: On his final leg in Africa Otto struggles as tropical rainfall make progress difficult and drinking water becomes scarce.

programme.title: E4 - Lewis Flats School
programme.desc: Zak and the crew land in Deming, NM, to investigate a mysterious school.

programme.title: E16 - Pain In The Ice
programme.desc: Following the arctic storm that drove everyone to shore, Shawn embarks on a marathon dive, Kris unveils a diving relay with The Reaper's new diver Shaunna.

programme.title: E14 - Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: Only days into the winter mining season, a regulator freeze up cuts off Shawn's air supply. Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: E10 - New Levels Of Chaos
programme.desc: Parker unleashes chaos as the team tries to get four wash plants running. Tony splurges on a new wash plant to get more gold.

programme.title: E12 - Women Drivers
programme.desc: Sig welcomes their newest greenhorn: his daughter. After four generations of Hansen fishermen, the next in line is a woman.

programme.title: 6000-Lb. Shark
programme.desc: With reports of enormous fat white sharks appearing off the coast of New Zealand, scientists Tom Hird and Leigh de Necker set out to find one of these behemoths.

programme.title: 6000-Lb. Shark
programme.desc: With reports of enormous fat white sharks appearing off the coast of New Zealand, scientists Tom Hird and Leigh de Necker set out to find one of these behemoths.

programme.desc: On his final leg in Africa Otto struggles as tropical rainfall make progress difficult and drinking water becomes scarce.

programme.desc: Only days into the winter mining season, a regulator freeze up cuts off Shawn's air supply. Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: E16 - Pain In The Ice
programme.desc: Following the arctic storm that drove everyone to shore, Shawn embarks on a marathon dive, Kris unveils a diving relay with The Reaper's new diver Shaunna.

programme.title: A Chicken Killer
programme.desc: Chip, the dog, is struggling to walk - can a new hip ease his pain? The Junior Vets give some flamingos a foot rub and check on a baby emu. Also, Johnny and Inel learn about the birds and the bees and investigate whether Jasper, the cat, really is a chicken killer.

programme.title: The Keeper (Maddie Hinch) and The Explorer (Ranulph Fiennes)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the world's best field hockey goalkeeper and Olympic gold medallist, Maddie Hinch, and the world's greatest living explorer, Ranulph Fiennes, share their record breaking journeys.

programme.title: Higher Power
programme.desc: The more high up in the sky we get, the stronger and less turbulent wind is. If only we could use that wind power as a source of alternative energy ... In this episode, we meet a team of scientists that successfully transmits power from up to three kilometers' altitude.

programme.title: Why Are Plants So Green?
programme.desc: The chlorophyll in plants takes in energy from sunlight. It absorbs colours like red and blue, but reflects the green wavelengths back to us. This process makes plants look green to our eyes.

programme.title: One Step at a Time
programme.desc: Will Homer's ultrasound reveal something more sinister lurking beneath? Marisa and trusty sidekick Megan kick into action to save two Labradors with lots of life left to live. And Charlie, the cute kitten, continues his fight for life - one gram at a time.

programme.title: Health Check-ups
programme.desc: Jamie and Nyatepe are helping vet Scott examine poorly dog Isla. Josh and Molly visit a newborn donkey. And alpacas are keeping Robyn and Bonte on their toes.

programme.title: Another Busy Day
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are removing a big lump from a dog's spleen, helping a cow give birth, and chasing down super-speedy birds at a theme park.

programme.title: Back to School
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the first day back at school after the holidays. Yoko doesn't know what school is, so Mai and Vik decide to set up a pretend classroom to explain it to him. Oto joins in and - thanks to Yoko's magic - becomes the head teacher!

programme.title: The Keeper (Maddie Hinch) and The Explorer (Ranulph Fiennes)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the world's best field hockey goalkeeper and Olympic gold medallist, Maddie Hinch, and the world's greatest living explorer, Ranulph Fiennes, share their record breaking journeys.

programme.title: Higher Power
programme.desc: The more high up in the sky we get, the stronger and less turbulent wind is. If only we could use that wind power as a source of alternative energy ... In this episode, we meet a team of scientists that successfully transmits power from up to three kilometers' altitude.

programme.title: Doppelgangers
programme.desc: The kids see themselves in a new light and discover the errors of their ways when Yoko creates magical doppelgangers of them!

programme.title: Giants of Japan
programme.desc: Doki decides to go to the Ogasawara Islands, Japan, to make his own deep sea nature video, and get footage of the rare and elusive giant squid! How hard could it be? The team learns that you have to practice and prepare before taking on big challenges.

programme.title: Wooden House
programme.desc: Boom should guess what Reds draw on the floor.

programme.title: Giants of Japan
programme.desc: Doki decides to go to the Ogasawara Islands, Japan, to make his own deep sea nature video, and get footage of the rare and elusive giant squid! How hard could it be? The team learns that you have to practice and prepare before taking on big challenges.

programme.title: Thailand
programme.desc: Phuket, Thailand adventure: Elephant trek with local teens, boat journey to Phi Phi islands, daring taste of fried insects, and beachside Muay Thai boxing lesson. A week of cultural immersion and thrilling experiences in Southeast Asia!

programme.title: Bad Luck Fish
programme.desc: Fontaine believes that a fish is responsible for wrecking Dolos' boat, sinking the Aronnax, and placing the Rover in deadly jeopardy!

programme.title: The Day Henry Met...a Crown
programme.desc: Today Henry meets a Crown in a palace. He becomes a Court Jester so he can help Crown throw a successful medieval banquet!

programme.title: The Joy Police
programme.desc: After a most cruel reign, Emperor Ashoka wanted to get himself some good karma. He decided to spread good throughout India, with the help of his stern 'joy police'. With Ashoka, happiness was no laughing matter!

programme.title: Garden Snail
programme.desc: Fiona's art lesson with Orla and Meabh backfires when they get excited and run wild with the paint. Grandad helps Binah appreciate snails on a new level after introducing her to the hilarious world of snail racing.

programme.title: The Keeper (Maddie Hinch) and The Explorer (Ranulph Fiennes)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the world's best field hockey goalkeeper and Olympic gold medallist, Maddie Hinch, and the world's greatest living explorer, Ranulph Fiennes, share their record breaking journeys.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team
programme.desc: When one of their friends gets hurt, Darwin and Newts form the Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team to help in an emergency.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Giants of Japan
programme.desc: Doki decides to go to the Ogasawara Islands, Japan, to make his own deep sea nature video, and get footage of the rare and elusive giant squid! How hard could it be? The team learns that you have to practice and prepare before taking on big challenges.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.desc: When one of their friends gets hurt, Darwin and Newts form the Kiwifruit Valley Rescue Team to help in an emergency.

programme.title: My Mother Looked Just Like You
programme.desc: Twenty years ago, Sharon's identical twin vanished. Now, a young woman enters Sharon's life, claiming to be her sister's daughter and bringing with her a revelation that will upend Sharon's whole life.

programme.title: E16 - Lamb Chops With Rice & Spinach
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a well-rounded meal of a French-cut rack of lamb, baked with Dijon mustard and seasoned breadcrumbs, and a side dish of brown and wild rice with porcini mushrooms and sauteed spinach.

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: Australian Chef of the Year, Hugh Allen, is back in the MasterChef kitchen to set a pressure test with his ‘Banksia Pod' dessert.

programme.title: My Mother Looked Just Like You

programme.title: E17 - Skirt Steak With Salsa Verde
programme.desc: Rachael's friend, author Anna Gass, demonstrates how to make an Italian potato and horseradish frittata, a traditional snack from the Basilicata region of Italy.

programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.desc: Rachael makes a delicious pasta dish with a creamy pea sauce layered with fresh pecorino cheese, baby greens and sauteed Guanciale, an Italian salt-cured meat coated with sage and rosemary.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: E41
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Bs Special 'Dull Gray Diamonds'
programme.desc: In western India lies a town known as the “Diamond City,” where rough diamonds from around the world are cut and polished by low‑paid craftsmen who have long supported the global diamond industry. Now, lab‑grown diamonds-mass‑produced through science and sold at less than one‑tenth the price of natural stones-are rapidly reshaping the market. As natural diamond prices fall by 40 percent and major companies suffer huge losses, life in the Diamond City itself is being shaken.

programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: The Visualization Entertainment: Go! Kaneo-Kun
programme.desc: The show is MC-ed by comedian Ariyoshi Hiroiki, who hosts an NHK program on a regular basis for the first time. The mascot character 'Kaneo-kun' (voice of Nobu, of comedy duo Chidori), who loves money, visits various places, including popular visiting locations, and looks into different phenomena to learn how money plays a role. The undertaking help unravel unexpected trends in society. The program, which can be enjoyed by every member of the family, offers much food for thought.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and the humpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: E4 - Mexico City
programme.desc: In Mexico City, for every baby born, two new vehicles hit these over-burdened streets.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E6 - Highlight 6
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese…

programme.title: E2 - Kamilaroi Highway (Part 1)
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in New South Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificent landscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way through a region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.desc: Today, Nawsheen presents a second penthouse in Mont Choisy, Grahame is working in the Black River area, Rinie and Manon show off the villas of Bel Hombre, Samuel presents three penthouses in the Grande Riviere, and Mridula is back in Anahita in the Beau Champ region.

programme.title: E4 - Newhaven Revisited
programme.desc: In 1999, Julia Brock and Tim Cox became the first couple to feature on the show, building a family home on the cliffs in Newhaven, East Sussex. Kevin McCloud revisits the Newhaven self build.

programme.desc: Preeti and Sanjeev struggle with their hectic work lives and their children's multiple meal demands, causing spiralling food bills and waste. Can Prue and Rupy's plan tickle everyone's taste buds?

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: The Gaze of the Double-Headed Eagle – Putin's East-West Game
programme.desc: Born into humble circumstances, he was once a secret weapon of the Soviet KGB; during his 26 years in the Kremlin, he held the fate of the double-headed eagle in his hands; he once looked to the West, only to return disappointed; between East and West, he repeatedly searched for his place. On his second visit to China, how will Putin rewrite Russia and his era?

programme.title: E172
programme.desc: GBA Discovery visits the 9+2 cities in the GBA. It provides in-depth coverage of the landmarks, personalities and hotspots in the Greater Bay Area, and leads viewers to experience the prosperity and innovation of the GBA in a holistic manner, as well as the lesser-known stories.

programme.title: E225
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E474
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E2 - Love Bites
programme.desc: Track a pregnant shark along the Great Barrier Reef and see if she leads a team of scientists to her hidden pupping ground. Then search for signs of mating along the southern coast that could reveal a very shy female megashark in search of a partner.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: E2 - Love Bites
programme.desc: Track a pregnant shark along the Great Barrier Reef and see if she leads a team of scientists to her hidden pupping ground. Then search for signs of mating along the southern coast that could reveal a very shy female megashark in search of a partner.

programme.title: E6 - Careful, There's Humans Up There!
programme.desc: Follow the southern team as they test new migration tech and tools that could reduce shark attacks in a popular snorkelling spot. Then catch and tag bull sharks with the northern team, who want to help local swimmers steer clear of birthing mothers.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E4 - Sidekicks
programme.desc: Unravel strange alliances that ensure mutual success in the wild. Explore the partnership between clownfish and anemones, watch oxpeckers keep savannah residents healthy, and review the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E1 - Family
programme.desc: Every empire needs a succession plan. Making babies – and raising them – is crucial for every species to survive. In some social circles, it takes a village to raise a family. In others, a single parent is all that stands between the vulnerability of youth and the threats of the wild.

programme.desc: Track a pregnant shark along the Great Barrier Reef and see if she leads a team of scientists to her hidden pupping ground. Then search for signs of mating along the southern coast that could reveal a very shy female megashark in search of a partner.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E18 - 愛錯的人教會我們做對的事
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E3 - 開業儀式正式啟動
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E3 - 開業儀式正式啟動
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E15 - 中日歌手唱《海闊天空》
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E7 - 新成員告五人加盟助力
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E45 - 退役特種兵受全場熱捧
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

E9
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。
